ham.subject: Ticket #12345 Resolved: Backend API Update
ham.body:
Hi Team,

I wanted to let you know that the issue reported in ticket #12345 has been resolved. The backend API now correctly returns the updated user profile data after the recent deployment. I ran a regression test yesterday and everything passed.

Key points:
- Fixed null pointer exception when fetching user data.
- Updated unit tests.
- Deployed to staging; ready for production.

Please pull the latest changes and verify. Let me know if any further issues.

Best,
Alex

spam.subject: URGENT: Confirm Your Scholarship Award to Receive Funds
spam.body:
Dear Student,

Congratulations! You have been selected as a recipient of the prestigious Global Scholars Program for the 2025-2026 academic year. To finalize your award, we require you to verify your personal information and complete a brief confirmation process.

Please click on the link below to submit your details and receive the scholarship funds directly into your university account:

<URL>

Failure to complete this process within 48 hours will result in your award being revoked. Your immediate attention is required.

Thank you for your prompt cooperation.

Sincerely,
Office of Scholarships
University of Excellence
